lastFailureMessage:
Startup hook did not produce a capture file. Exit code: 0. stdout: Description:
  The EssentialCSharp.ListingManager helps to organize and manage the EssentialCSharp source code

Usage:
  EssentialCSharp.ListingManager [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  update <directoryIn>  Updates namespaces and filenames for all listings and accompanying tests within a chapter
  scan                  Scans for various things
